de.uka.ilkd.key.util.pp

Class StringBackend

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.pp.StringBackend
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Backend
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    LogicPrinter.PosTableStringBackend

    public class StringBackend
extends Object
implements Backend
    A Backend which appends all output to a StringBuffer. The mark(Object o) method does nothing in this implementation. There is a method count() which returns the number of characters written by this so far. The method getString() gets the output written so far.

    • Field Summary

      Modifier and Type Field and Description

      protected int lineWidth 
      protected StringBuffer out

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void close()
      Closes this backend

      Flushes any buffered output

      Returns the available space per line

      Gets called to record a mark() call in the input.
      int measure(String s)
      Returns the space required to print the String s

    • Constructor Detail

      • StringBackend

        public StringBackend(StringBuffer sb,
                     int lineWidth)
        Create a new StringBackend. This will append all output to the given StringBuffer sb.

      • StringBackend

        public StringBackend(int lineWidth)
        Create a new StringBackend. This will accumulate output in a fresh, private StringBuffer.

    • Method Detail

      • print

        public void print(String s)
           throws IOException
        Append a String s to the output. s contains no newlines.
